chinese: 顧客在櫃檯附近看完長菜單時，他請服務生推薦一道不要太油的健康料理，因為這家人想記住這頓愉快的午餐。

english: Because the children were hungry after school and wanted a warm meal, he asked the waiter to recommend a healthy dish without too much oil, after a short conversation with the friendly owner.
chinese: 因為孩子們放學後餓了並想吃一份熱餐，他請服務生推薦一道不要太油的健康料理，在與友善老闆短暫交談後。

english: Before my father paid the bill with his credit card, he asked the waiter to recommend a healthy dish without too much oil, after a short conversation with the friendly owner.
chinese: 在我爸爸用信用卡付帳單之前，他請服務生推薦一道不要太油的健康料理，在與友善老闆短暫交談後。

english: Although the coffee shop was small and the line was long, he asked the waiter to recommend a healthy dish without too much oil, even though the restaurant was busy that evening.
chinese: 雖然這家咖啡店很小且隊伍很長，他請服務生推薦一道不要太油的健康料理，即使那天晚上餐廳很忙。

english: After the chef served fish, rice, soup, and dessert, he asked the waiter to recommend a healthy dish without too much oil, even though the restaurant was busy that evening.
chinese: 主廚送上魚、飯、湯和甜點後，他請服務生推薦一道不要太油的健康料理，即使那天晚上餐廳很忙。

english: When the teacher brought the students to the restaurant for lunch, he asked the waiter to recommend a healthy dish without too much oil, so the children learned how to order politely.
chinese: 老師帶學生們到餐廳吃午餐時，他請服務生推薦一道不要太油的健康料理，所以孩子們學會如何有禮貌地點餐。

english: Because the old man had a strong appetite and liked simple food, he asked the waiter to recommend a healthy dish without too much oil, so the children learned how to order politely.
chinese: 因為老人食慾很好且喜歡簡單食物，他請服務生推薦一道不要太油的健康料理，所以孩子們學會如何有禮貌地點餐。

english: After the waiter cleaned the table and brought new plates, he asked the waiter to recommend a healthy dish without too much oil, because the correct bill showed a fair charge.
chinese: 服務生清理桌子並拿來新盤子後，他請服務生推薦一道不要太油的健康料理，因為正確帳單顯示合理費用。

english: When the owner noticed that the customer looked unhappy, he asked the waiter to recommend a healthy dish without too much oil, because the correct bill showed a fair charge.
chinese: 當老闆注意到顧客看起來不開心時，他請服務生推薦一道不要太油的健康料理，因為正確帳單顯示合理費用。

english: After the family entered the crowded restaurant and found their regular table, the family thanked the chef because the dessert tasted beautiful and sweet, so everyone felt comfortable during the whole meal.
chinese: 這家人走進擁擠的餐廳並找到固定桌位後，這家人感謝主廚，因為甜點吃起來美味又甜，所以每個人在整個用餐過程中都感到舒服。

english: When the customer finished reading the long menu near the counter, the family thanked the chef because the dessert tasted beautiful and sweet, so everyone felt comfortable during the whole meal.

english: Because the children were hungry after school and wanted a warm meal, the family thanked the chef because the dessert tasted beautiful and sweet, before we left the restaurant and walked home together.

english: Before my father paid the bill with his credit card, the family thanked the chef because the dessert tasted beautiful and sweet, before we left the restaurant and walked home together.
